description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in rugged, outdoorsy attire reminiscent of a hunter or adventurer. He wears a wide-brimmed hat, a short-sleeved shirt, and a sleeveless vest adorned with visible ammunition loops and pockets. His pants are straight-cut and paired with sturdy boots, and he has a holster or pouch attached to his belt. One hand is gloved, adding to the utilitarian look, and his face is partially obscured by the hat's brim. The overall appearance suggests a character prepared for outdoor or urban exploration, with practical accessories and a confident stance.
description: A rugged adult male figure in a hat, vest with ammunition, and boots, styled as an outdoorsman or adventurer.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, including the hat, vest with ammunition, shirt, pants, boots, and gloved hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the holster on the belt, the profile of the hat, and the straight cut of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, the hat's band, and the straight posture with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the gloved hand, the side of the vest, and the boots' profile.
attribute_clothing_type: outdoor vest with ammunition loops, short-sleeved shirt, straight-cut pants, utility belt, and wide-brimmed hat
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
